<!--
Template created by KittyTeggie under the Creative Commons Zero v1.0 (public domain) license.
https://github.com/kittyteggie/mediawiki-templates

THIS TEMPLATE DEPENDS OF THE 'MessageBox' TEMPLATE THAT IS AVAIDABLE IN THE 'MessageBox.wiki' FILE
-->
{{MessageBox|text= '''This article is a stub.'''<br/>
This article requires some more information, as it is too short. If you think you have any good information, [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} please add to this page!]
|image=Stub.png <!-- THIS IS AN EXAMPLE FILE, CHANGE IT WITH WHATEVER ICON YOU'LL USE -->
|imagelink=Category:Stubs
|imagewidth=45px
|border-color=10px solid blue}}<includeonly>[[Category:Stubs]]</includeonly>
